s: In 2024, Michel Otanez suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.440, WHIP 1.380, SO 55, WAR 0.700.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> ATH).
In 2025, Michel Otanez suited up for ATH as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 2.250, SO 6, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined ATH.
